framework: UNESCO AI Competency Framework for Teachers (AI-CFT) 2024
note: Performance-based competency mapping. Strength is a ceiling on observed evidence_strength. Scorer must add item-specific rationale and confidence.

WS3_B1.rationale: Applies threshold values to classify items, demonstrates parameter application and interpretation of model decisions.

WS3_B7.rationale: Applies and justifies threshold choices in a spreadsheet/tool context, requires evaluating trade-offs between sensitivity and misclassification.
